pageTitle: cyAsk the court to make an order
caption: cyMake an application
heading: cyAsk the court to make an order
paragraph1: cyYou can ask the court to make a decision at any point during your case. This is called an application.
forExampleYouCanUseThisTo: cyFor example, you can use this to:
addAnExtraParty: cyadd someone as an extra party to your claim
reliefFromSanctions: cyask the court not to punish you for breaching an order (relief from sanctions)
serveAClaimOutsideEnglandAndWales: cyserve a claim outside England & Wales
transferForEnforcement: cytransfer to the High Court for enforcement by a writ of possession
cannotSuspendOnlineIntro: cyYou cannot apply to suspend (stop or delay) the eviction online.
readGuidance: cyread the guidance explaining how to suspend the eviction (GOV.UK, opens in a new tab)
fillInFormForSuspend: cyfill in the N244a form (GOV.UK, opens in a new tab)
ifYouCanPayTheCourtFee: cyif you can pay the court fee, or if you need help with fees (help to pay court fees)
whatYouWantTheCourtToDo: cywhat you want the court to do
whyYouAreAskingTheCourt: cywhy you are asking the court to do it, for example any evidence you have to support your application
youMayNeedToProvideEvidence: cyYou may need to provide some evidence for the court.
beforeYouStart: cyBefore you start: Make sure that you have all of the evidence you need to apply.
onceYouStart: cyOnce you start your application, you cannot save your progress as a draft.
weWillNotSaveYourAnswers: cyThis means that if you leave your application before submitting, we will not save your answers so that you can return to them later.
usualCosts: cyIt usually costs {{standardFee, currency(currency: GBP; trailingZeroDisplay: stripIfInteger)}} to apply. The fee will increase to {{maxFee, currency(currency: GBP; trailingZeroDisplay: stripIfInteger)}} if:
youHaveAlreadyToldTheOtherParty: cyyou have already told the other party that you are making this application, and
theyDidNotAgreeToIt: cythey did not agree to it (this means that they have objected to it)
youWillSeeTheFinalApplicationFee: cyYou’ll see the final application fee before you pay.
ifYouAreWorriedAboutPayingFees: cyIf you are worried about paying fees
youMayBeEligibleForHWF: cyYou may be eligible to apply for help with fees (GOV.UK, opens in a new tab). We will ask you if you want to do this when you apply.
ifPreferToRespondByPost: cyIf you’d prefer to respond by post:
sendTheCompletedFormToTheCourt: cysend the completed form to the court
